hero.headingHtml:
We turn web
presence into a
business engine.
hero.body: Focused sprints. Shared ownership. Zero black boxes. We don't sell hours, we don't invent work — and if you don't need us, we'll tell you.

ai.title: AI that delivers value.
ai.sub: No empty prompt engineering. We build agents, data pipelines and autonomous flows that actually automate decisions.

items.name: AI Apps & Agents
items.desc: GPTs, Claude Apps, autonomous agents with memory and context.

items.name: AI Crawling & Extraction
items.desc: Pipeline to feed your own or external LLMs. Structured scraping.

items.name: MCP Server & Tools
items.desc: We build MCP servers for your tools. Open source to the client.

items.name: GEO & AI Search
items.desc: Optimization for ChatGPT Search, Perplexity, Gemini. Schema markup and content.

items.name: AI Migration
items.desc: Migration of prompts, agents and flows to your private infrastructure.

services.title: Six engagements. Each with independent value.
services.intro: No bundled retainers. Each artifact stands on its own — so you can stop or continue with full information.

items.name: Discovery Sprint
items.desc: Audience segmentation, customer journeys, AI, SEO strategy, KPI baseline, prioritized backlog. Each artifact independently approvable.

items.name: Web Performance Partnership
items.desc: Embedded sprints to improve conversion, lead generation, organic traffic and retention. Shared ownership of results.

items.name: Stack Audit
items.desc: We map your stack — forms, CRM, automation, analytics. We identify waste and gaps. Migration roadmap. No new complexity.

items.name: Segment SEO
items.desc: Long-tail SEO built on your real buyer segments — not generic keywords. Tied to conversion goals.

items.name: KPI Baseline & Dashboard
items.desc: GA4, Looker Studio dashboard, six-month targets. Internal visibility without development overhead.

items.name: Growth Partnership
items.desc: Ongoing sprint-based engagement with shared upside. We grow when you grow — not before.

partner.title: Clients are not accounts.
partner.sub: They are co-owners of the result. Each engagement is structured with shared upside, transparent milestones and deliverables with independent value.

process.title: A lab built on sprints.
process.sub: Two-week cycles. Public commitments. Co-owned dashboards. If something isn't working, we say so.

steps.d: We define the one metric that matters. Everything else is noise.
Audiences, journeys, friction points. Public artifacts you approve independently.
Co-managed execution. Daily commits. Dashboard visible from day one.
Baseline → result, in your numbers. No vanity metrics, no abstractions.
Continue, descope, or handoff. We tell you which — even when continuing pays us more.

founders.title: 45+ years, embedded as partners.
founders.sub: No account managers. No team layers. All three founders work with you directly, every sprint.

items.name: Jorge Saud
items.bio: Solutions Architect, 13+ years. Former CTO leading teams of 25+. 30+ projects delivered. Industrial engineering rigor: bottleneck thinking, process optimization, zero over-engineering.

items.name: Edgar Yanez
items.bio: 15+ years leading design at the highest level of Chilean corporate and financial services. Currently leads design at one of LATAM's largest retail and insurance conglomerates.

items.name: Mauricio Naranjo
items.bio: 15+ years delivering complex digital projects in fintech, telco and retail at national scale in Chile. Operational discipline, clean handoffs, commitments that are kept.

items.q: How is this different from an agency retainer?
items.a: We charge for results, not hours. Each engagement has a defined scope, measurable success metric and artifacts with independent value. You can stop after any sprint with everything documented and approved.

items.q: What does 'shared upside' mean in practice?
items.a: In Growth Partnerships, part of our compensation is tied to the committed metric. We grow when you grow. We have the same skin in the game as your internal team.

items.q: Do we need to use specific tools?
items.a: No. We map your current stack and improve it. If migration is needed we build a roadmap, but introducing new complexity is the last resort, not the first.
A Discovery Sprint starts within 2 weeks of signing. A Web Performance sprint in 1 week, depending on scope.

items.q: What if we don't need a sprint?
items.a: We'll tell you. Honesty is an operating principle, not a value on a slide. A 30-minute call is enough to know if we're a fit.

finalCta.title: If you don't need us, we'll tell you.
finalCta.sub: A 30-minute call to see if a sprint is the right next step. No pitch deck.

footer.note: Be Partner Labs · Santiago · Bogotá · Mexico City
footer.rights: © 2026 Be Partner Labs. Honesty is not a value on a slide.
